title: DiexvCreeper
description: A special Creeper.It almost never dies naturally.It boasts a unique boss health bar, and the projectiles it fires can automatically track enemies, releasing colored lightning.
body:
This mod adds a special creeper. You can challenge it using the mod you made. It boasts a unique boss health bar, and the projectiles it fires can automatically track enemies, releasing colored lightning. In the future, I will continue to add new content to this mod.

Currently, the following features have been added to DiexvCreeper:

1. Health lock (lock your health to full)

2. Lightning armor switch (turn on or off its lightning armor appearance)

3. Automatic resurrection (determines whether it will be resurrected in place after disappearing)

4. Flash kill attack (instantly killing enemies)

5. Prohibit generation (prohibit other entities from generating)

6. AllReturn (a type of code attack)

7. Range attack (attacking entities in the world)

8. Ignoring gravity (enabling DiexvReeper to fly)

9. Clean up the screen (clean up junk GUI, such as blood bars left on the screen after some entities are removed)

10. Protect players (return the getHealth method to 20 and intercept setHealth operations)

11. Violent Blood Modification (Violent modification of all numerical storage fields)

12. Play music (there seems to be a bug currently)

这个模组添加了一个特殊的苦力怕。你可以使用自己制作的模组挑战它。它拥有独特的BOSS血条，它发射的弹射物会自动追踪敌人，会释放彩色闪电。未来我将继续添加新内容到这个模组。

目前已为DiexvCreeper添加以下功能：

1.血量锁定（将自己的生命值锁定为满）


2.闪电护甲开关（开启或关闭它的闪电护甲外观）

3.自动复活（决定它消失后是否会原地复活）

4.秒杀攻击（瞬间击杀敌人）

5.禁生成（禁止其它实体生成）

6.AllReturn（一种代码攻击）

7.范围攻击（攻击世界中的实体）

8.无视重力（使DiexvCreeper能够飞行）

9.清理屏幕（清理垃圾GUI，例如一些实体被移除后在屏幕上留下的血条）

10.保护玩家（将getHealth方法返回20，拦截setHealth操作）

11.暴力改血（暴力修改所有数字存储字段）

12.播放音乐（目前似乎有bug）
